title: Shattering Salty Turkish Anchovy Kebabs
description: Bold, briny, and festive, these anchor kebabs bring a shattering flavor to any dinner table.
instructions: Thread the anchovy fillets onto skewers and brush them with olive oil.
Sprinkle sumac, paprika, garlic powder, oregano, sea salt, and cracked pepper over the fillets and mix with lemon zest and lemon juice to create a bright marination.
Let the kebabs marinate for 10 minutes while you preheat the air fryer to 200C.
Place the skewered anchors in the air fryer basket and cook for 8 minutes, turning halfway, until the fillets are crisp and shattering.
Meanwhile, heat the dolsot stone bowl in a dry pan until it is smoky hot, then add a splash of olive oil and the gluten-free flatbread to toast for 30 seconds on each side.
Remove the flatbread and set it aside on a towel to keep warm.
Arrange the freshly air-fried anchovy kebabs on the toasted flatbread, drizzle any remaining lemon juice, and garnish with chopped parsley.
Serve immediately as a festive, briny dish that delivers a shattering crunch.
